consentForm.acceptBothError: Please accept both agreements to continue.
consentForm.declineMessage:
You have the right to disagree with these terms and conditions. This is completely within your rights as a patient.

However, please understand that by choosing not to agree, we cannot proceed with the telehealth appointment booking as these consents are required for providing telehealth services safely and legally.

You may still schedule an in-person appointment if you prefer, or take time to review these documents and return when you're ready to proceed.
consentForm.title: Consent & Terms
consentForm.subtitle: Please review and accept the following to proceed with your appointment.
consentForm.telehealthContent:
I. PLATFORM INFORMATION

01. Clinecxa is a telehealth and patient health information management platform owned and operated by Square Coin Pty Ltd (‘Square Coin Australia’), a company duly registered and incorporated under the laws of Australia.

02. Square Coin Lanka (Pvt) Ltd. (‘Square Coin Lanka’), a company duly registered and incorporated under the laws of the Socialist Democratic Republic of Sri Lanka, manages the operation of Clinecxa in the said republic.

03. Any reference to Clinecxa’s responsibilities and/or liabilities herein and hereunder shall pertain solely to that of Square Coin Lanka, and not of Square Coin Australia. For all intents and purposes the former indemnifies the latter.

04. Clinecxa’s legal responsibility is limited to the provision of the technology platform. Medical services are provided by independent, licensed healthcare practitioners and not employees, agents, or representatives of Clinecxa, Square Coin Pty Ltd, or Square Coin Lanka (Pvt) Ltd.

05. Clinecxa does not provide medical advice and is not responsible for clinical decisions made by clinicians. All medical advice, diagnoses, treatment, and clinical decisions are the sole responsibility of the treating clinician. Clinecxa does not control or direct clinical practice and is not responsible for medical outcomes. Accordingly, Clinecxa disclaims liability for clinical decisions and treatment outcomes.

06. Any/all users of Clinecxa agree to indemnify Clinecxa against claims arising from misuse of the platform or breach of these terms by other parties. For the avoidance of doubt, such indemnification applies to the benefit of both Square Coin Lanka, Square Coin Australia and its directors/shareholder/employees/agents.

II. NATURE OF TELEHEALTH SERVICES

07. Telehealth involves the use of electronic communications to enable healthcare providers to consult, assess, diagnose, treat, and educate patients using telecommunications technology, including video, audio, and secure digital messaging.

III. ELECTRONIC HEALTH RECORDS & DATA STORAGE

08. By using Clinecxa, you hereby provide consent for:

a) Creation and maintenance of your personal and health data and information;
b) Secure storage of your data and information in cloud infrastructure including Amazon S3 and Supabase, configured in a HIPAA-compliant manner;
c) Access to your health data and information by your treating clinicians and authorised operational staff; and
d) Use of your data and information for clinical care, care coordination, quality improvement, and continuity of treatment.

09. All personal and health data and information is protected under the Personal Data Protection Act, No. 9 of 2022 (‘PDPA’). For further details, please refer to the Clinecxa Privacy Policy.

IV. CARER / GUARDIAN CONSENT

10. If you are making a booking on behalf of another person, you hereby confirm that:

a) You are legally authorised to act on behalf of the patient;
b) You have authority to provide consent for telehealth services and data collection and processing;
c) All information you provide is accurate and complete;
d) You accept responsibility for the accuracy of the information submitted; and
e) You provide consent on behalf of the patient for all terms outlined in this agreement.

V. CLINICAL NOTES & RECORDINGS

11. Telehealth sessions and consultation will not be recorded.

12. Clinicians may take clinical notes as part of standard medical practice to support diagnosis, treatment, and continuity of care.

VI. RISKS, LIMITATIONS & MEDICAL DISCLAIMER

13. You hereby acknowledge and accept the following and any/all consequential risks and/or losses of the same:

a) Telehealth has inherent limitations and may not detect all medical conditions;
b) A physical examination may be required for accurate diagnosis;
c) No guarantee of diagnosis or treatment outcome can be provided;
d) Clinical decisions are based on the information you provide and what can be reasonably assessed via telehealth;
e) Miscommunication, technical issues, or incomplete information may affect care.

VII. NOT AN EMERGENCY SERVICE

14. Clinecxa and its clinicians do not provide emergency medical services.

15. In case of a medical emergency, you must immediately contact local emergency services.

16. Telehealth is not a replacement for ongoing in-person care by a general practitioner or specialist management.

VIII. PRIVACY & SECURITY

17. Reasonable technical and organisational safeguards are in place to protect your data and information. However, no system can be guaranteed to be completely secure. You acknowledge and accept the residual risk of unauthorised access.

IX. COMMUNICATION CONSENT

18. Subject to clause 19 below, you hereby consent to being contacted via: SMS, Email, Phone calls, and In-app notifications and messages.

19. You hereby consent to be contacted for the purposes of: Appointment reminders, Clinical follow-ups, Care coordination, Service reviews and quality assurance, and Understanding and improving the performance of the platform and clinicians, and any other lawful purpose.

X. PATIENT RESPONSIBILITIES

20. You hereby agree to:

a) Provide accurate and complete medical information and data;
b) Attend sessions from a private and safe location;
c) Ensure adequate internet, camera, and audio;
d) Test your technology prior to the appointment;
e) Seek in-person or emergency care when advised.

XI. PROVIDER RESPONSIBILITIES

21. Clinicians and/or healthcare providers shall: Make reasonable attempts to verify patient identity and location, Maintain professional standards of care, Maintain confidentiality, Recommend in-person care when clinically required, and Discontinue telehealth if it is or becomes inappropriate for your condition.

22. In the event a clinician or healthcare provider organizes a physical or in-person appointment with a patient and/or user upon the use of Clinecxa or in the absence of the use of Clinecxa, the legal responsibilities and liabilities associated with the care of the patient and medical services shall remain solely with the clinician or healthcare provider. Such providers shall indemnify Clinecxa against all losses, damages, claims and expenses arising from a breach of professional or legal responsibilities.

XII. CANCELLATIONS, LATE ARRIVAL & REFUNDS

23. Cancellation Window: Appointments must be cancelled at least 12 hours before the scheduled time for no fee. Cancellations within 12 hours may incur a cancellation fee.

24. Late Arrival: A grace period of 5 minutes is allowed. Upon the lapse of 5 minutes, the appointment will be considered akin to being attended by the clinician and will be charged in full.

25. No refund will be issued for late arrivals.

26. If the clinician does not attend the appointment, you may contact Clinecxa to request a refund.

27. For further details, please refer to the Refund Policy.

XIII. CONSENT & WITHDRAWAL

28. You may withdraw your consent at any time in writing. Withdrawal shall not affect care or actions already undertaken prior to withdrawal.

29. By selecting “I Accept”, you confirm that:

a) You have read, understood, and voluntarily agreed to all terms and conditions above;
b) You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Clinecxa, Square Coin Lanka and Square Coin Australia against all losses arising from your breach of terms;
c) If you are outside Sri Lanka, you ensure that local laws permit the use of Clinecxa and you indemnify Clinecxa against any liability arising from your resident jurisdiction laws.

XIV. GOVERNING LAW

30. These Terms and Conditions are governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka.

XV. AMENDMENTS

31. Clinecxa reserves the right to modify these Terms and Conditions from time to time. Updated terms will be published on the platform and users will be prompted to peruse and accept or reject the same.
consentForm.termsContent: By ticking this box, you confirm that you have read and understood the CLINECXA PRIVACY POLICY. You agree to the collection, use, processing, and storage of your personal and health data as described in the policy, including the data sharing and retention periods specified. You acknowledge that your data will be handled in compliance with the Personal Data Protection Act, No. 9 of 2022 ('PDPA') and other applicable laws.
consentForm.agreeText: I have read and agree to the {section}
consentForm.declineTerms: I do not agree to these terms

PaymentConfirmation.prepareTitle: How to Prepare for Your Telehealth Appointment
PaymentConfirmation.prepareHeading: How to prepare for your telehealth appointment.

email.title: Email confirmation:
email.description: You will shortly receive an email to your registered email address with the appointment link. Please check your SPAM folder if you don’t see this email in your email.

appointmentDay.title: On appointment day:
appointmentDay.description: Click on the link provided in your email to join the appointment. Your doctor will join you on time. Make sure you have a stable internet connection and are in a quiet and private environment.

members.title: Additional members:
members.description: If you selected additional members for this appointment, please let them know that they will also receive an email.

followup.title: Follow-up call:
followup.description: Once your appointment is completed, we will call you to see how we did and how we can improve our services. Your feedback is valuable to us.

PaymentConfirmation.footer: Thank you for choosing our telehealth services. We look forward to providing you with excellent care.

benefits.1: Reach new patients in your area

verified.title: Verified doctors
verified.text: All doctors are vetted and approved before listing

fast.title: Fast booking
fast.text: Book consultations in under a minute

howto.title: How It Works
howto.subtitle: Everything you need to know before booking a telehealth consultation

items.q: How do I create an account?
items.a: Select the service you need, and follow the instructions to make the appointment. During this process you can sign up using your email address.

items.q: Can I create an account for a family member?
items.a: Absolutely. You can create an account for you, or your family member. You also have the ability to attend the consultation with them.

items.q: How do I book a session with a doctor or specialist?
items.a: Go to the home page, and select the service you are after. Select the number of attendees to the appointment, and confirm a date and a time for your appointment. Then follow the given steps to login to your account (or create new account), and make the appointment payment, you will receive an email with the appointment confirmation and video link.

items.q: How do I know which specialist I should book?
items.a: Home page shows the definition of each specialty. When you select a specialist, the next page will show their expertise, languages spoken, and a short description of them. If you’re unsure, you can book a general practitioner first for guidance.

items.q: Can I reschedule or cancel an appointment?
items.a: Yes, you can. If you cancel or reschedule at least 12 hours before your appointment, there’s no fee. Changes made within 12 hours may include a cancellation or rescheduling fee.

items.q: what do i need for the video call?
items.a: Only a smart phone. Our platform has been built to make it easy for you, and it works in your browser and on smart mobile devices. Just ensure your camera and microphone are enabled.

items.q: What if my internet connection drops during the session?
items.a: If the call disconnects, you can rejoin from the same link. If the issue continues, the clinician may request to switch to an audio call or reschedule the session.

Absolutely. No video/audio consultation is ever recorded. Only you and your clinician have access to the conversation, unless an additional attendee is joined to that conversation from the patient’s side.

items.q: How can I send my reports to the doctor?
items.a: When booking your appointment, you’ll be asked a few questions about your reason for the visit. You’ll also be able to upload up to 3 documents or photos (including images taken from your phone). These will be shared directly with your doctor.

items.q: How do I receive a prescription?
items.a: After your consultation, your prescription will be sent to you as an image through our official WhatsApp number. Please note that this number is not a direct line to the doctor, and no medical advice will be provided through WhatsApp.

items.q: Can I get a medical certificate from a clinician?
items.a: No. Under Sri Lankan regulations, medical certificates cannot be issued through telehealth without a physical examination. You will need to visit a doctor or hospital in person to obtain one.

items.q: How do I pay for my appointment?
items.a: You can pay using your debit/credit card or other popular Sri Lankan mobile payment methods during the final step of your booking.
Yes. All payment data is processed through secure gateways. We never store your card details.
Any smartphone, tablet, or computer with stable internet connection, video, and microphone.

items.q: What should I do if I cannot join the video call?
items.a: Check your internet connection, browser permissions for camera and mic, and try refreshing the page. If it still doesn’t work, please contact our support team immediately.

items.q: Are the clinicians qualified and registered?
items.a: Yes. All clinicians are verified Sri Lankan medical professionals registered with the relevant medical councils.

footer.disclaimerText: Please do not use this service for emergencies or if you require medical certificates. For emergencies: Go to your nearest hospital or emergency service immediately, or call 110. For medical certificates or physical examinations: Please visit a doctor in person, as these services cannot be provided through telehealth. This platform is intended only for telehealth consultations that do not require in-person care.

story.title: The Founder’s Story
story.para1: Our journey began with someone very close to the founder - his little sister. She is autistic, with heightened senses that make everyday environments feel overwhelming. A trip to the doctor, something most of us take for granted, can be incredibly stressful for her. The long queues, crowded waiting rooms, noise, and unpredictability often lead to anxiety and emotional overload.
story.para2: As he moved further away from home, his parents became the ones responsible for taking her to appointments. Over time, it became harder: the travel, the waiting, the emotional toll, all of it felt exhausting and unfair, not just for his sister, but for thousands of families across Sri Lanka facing similar challenges.
story.para3: During his time abroad, he saw how other countries had embraced telehealth, not as a luxury, but as a necessity. It wasn’t just a video call with a doctor; it was a system built around accessibility, dignity, and patient comfort.
story.para4: He wondered why Sri Lanka didn’t have something like this. Yes, there had been attempts, but they were technology-first, not people-first. They weren’t shaped by clinicians or the realities of Sri Lankan families.
story.para5: So he returned to the drawing board.
story.para6: He spent months speaking with Sri Lankan doctors, specialists, patients, and caregivers to understand what actually mattered. He built the first version from his own savings. And at the heart of it was one simple goal: to create a system that makes healthcare easier for families like his, for people with disabilities, and for anyone who deserves a kinder way to access care.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.text: To be Sri Lanka’s number-one telehealth service: where patients feel safe, care is stress-free, clinicians thrive, and privacy and data security are uncompromised.

trust.title: 1. Trust and Safety First
trust.description: At Clinecxa, we work hard every day to ensure that patients feel safe, clinicians feel protected, and partners trust our platform. Every decision we make; from clinical workflows to data security and governance; is driven by an uncompromising commitment to ethics, privacy, and patient safety. Trust is not a slogan for us; it is the standard we operate by.

quality.title: 2. Medical Quality Comes First. Technology Follows.
quality.description: Clinecxa is a clinically led platform. This system was not designed by technologists alone, it was built with and guided by practicing clinicians. Clinical standards, professional judgment, and patient outcomes lead to every design decision. Technology exists to support great medicine, remove friction, and enhance care, never to override or dilute clinical quality.

equality.title: 3. Equal Care and Opportunity for Every Patient and Clinician
equality.description: Clinecxa exists to remove barriers. We believe every patient deserves the same standard of care, and every clinician deserves equal access to high-quality tools, reach, and opportunity; regardless of location, background, or size of practice. By building an inclusive and fair platform, we enable better outcomes for everyone.

founder.para1: Clinecxa was born from a simple but powerful idea: healthcare should be easier, kinder, and more accessible for everyone, especially for families like mine. Watching my little sister struggle with appointments, being overwhelmed by her environment, and knowing my parents had to handle them while I was far away, made me wish I could be there to support them too.
founder.para2: I also saw the challenges clinicians face in Sri Lanka. Unlike in some other countries, they often juggle long commutes, heavy patient loads, and endless queues, which adds stress and reduces the time they can give to each patient. I wanted to change that. A system that gives clinicians better work-life balance leads to happier, less stressed doctors...and that directly means better care for patients.
founder.para3: There are so many people in similar situations, living far from their parents and families back home, caring for someone with a disability, or juggling work, life, and financial pressures. Healthcare shouldn’t add to that burden.
founder.para4: Our mission is to change all of this. Clinecxa is built to put people first: patients, caregivers, and clinicians alike. Every feature, every process, every decision is guided by one goal: to make healthcare simpler, safer, and more compassionate for everyone, no matter where they are or what their circumstances.
founder.para5: Thank you for trusting us with your care.
